reason: Review gate for the frontend editor/lib changes (quality bar, tests).
Verify the supply? + LoadResult filename contract stays consistent across TS and Rust.
Verify new commands follow IPC conventions and return Result<_, String> error handling.
Verify the editor capability grants only the needed permissions (least privilege) and path-traversal guard on filenames.
Verify no any, unknown narrowed, types explicit on the new public helpers.
